subtasks.description: Call episodic_remember to store portfolio snapshot for traceability.

completion_evidence: Loaded user portfolio: 35 positions totaling 93.1% invested (approx. 6.9% unallocated/cash). Heavy tilts: Information Technology (semiconductors/app software), Utilities (electric & multi-utilities), ETFs (emerging markets, commodities, short-term credit), Industrial/Data Center REITs, and Diversified Banks. Largest weights: EQIX 8.1%, NVDA 6.5%, NRG 5.5%, BSX 5.1%, JPM 4.3%, SLVR 3.6%, EIS 3.7%, IIPR 3.7%, CMS 3.6%, VCSH 3.0%, IGSB 3.1%. Observations: multiple small speculative tech names (APP, EXOD, FUFU, DGNX), several industrial REITs (FR, IIPR, STAG, TRNO), commodity ETFs (SLVR, SGDM, NLR), EM ETFs (EIS, GREK, EMQQ), three banks (JPM, FITB, INTR, NU). Sum allocations = 0.931. Will snapshot to memory next.

tasks.description: Synthesize strengths and weaknesses from analytics

subtasks.description: List specific strengths (drivers, resilient exposures, low-corr pairs, positive tilts).
List specific weaknesses (risk drivers, redundancy, high beta/corr, weak risk-adjusted returns).

tasks.description: Identify trims and source replacement candidates

subtasks.description: From analytics, flag high-risk/low-return tickers and highly correlated redundancies.
Call stock_screener (criteria_dict for low beta/corr, high quality/momentum, diversification).
Call get_industry_benchmark_calculations and get_sub_industry_benchmark_calculations to benchmark candidates.
Call fetch_ticker_repository_data (news/ratings/targets) for shortlisted tickers.
Call get_analyst_picks to cross-reference conviction ideas (if relevant).
Call pull_rest_of_ticker_pool to expand candidate universe if needed.
Draft proposed portfolio_dict (keeps, trims, adds) aligned to preferences.
Call build_portfolio to optimize weights under risk targets (lower beta/corr, higher Sharpe/alpha).

tasks.description: Iterate and validate improvements on new portfolio

subtasks.description: Re-run calculate_portfolio_performance, calculate_portfolio_returns_metrics, beta, factor tilts, correlation matrix.
Re-run portfolio_VaR_calculator and portfolio_stress_test to validate risk bounds.
Re-run calculate_group_performances and portfolio_industry_concentration to confirm diversification.
If targets unmet, adjust constituents/weights and loop.
Call check_parallel_execution_options to parallelize independent analytics.
Call add_task_evidence to log key findings for each task/subtask.
Call update_task_status and mark_task_complete as milestones progress.
Call advance_to_next_task and get_current_task_info to drive workflow.
Call get_task_progress_summary and get_execution_summary for oversight.
Call episodic_remember to save final rationale and decisions.
Format and output the ENTIRE new portfolio in strict JSON per spec.
